basic_details.job_title: GMCH Chandigarh Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh (GMCH Chandigarh)
basic_details.short_information: Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh (GMCH Chandigarh) Project Research Scientist I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of GMCH Chandigarh. Has been announced through the GMCH Chandigarh Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be given as per ICMR/Govt rules to SC/ST/OBC categories on production of appropriate certificate.

qualification.education_qualification: First class MSc, PhD, MSc degree, MBBS / BDS/ MD/DNB
qualification.details: First class MSc in biotechnology/ genetics/ microbiology/immunology PhD in above subjects with at least second class MSc degree MBBS / BDS/ MD/DNB

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualification and research experience Written Test (if number of candidates more) Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
